facebook.caption:
13,473 reviews. 4.5 stars. Grand World Phu Quoc keeps pulling people back.

Canals, lights, live performances, and a full street of restaurants at Bãi Dài. It hits different at night when everything is lit up and the crowds actually add to the energy.

Not every Phu Quoc day needs a beach. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Canals, neon lights, and street food all in one spot at Grand World Phu Quoc. 13,473 people rated this 4.5 stars. Walk it at night and you'll see why.
